objective: Implement v1.1 handoff contract infrastructure: schema, validator, hook libraries, durable handoff examples, and active-handoff pointer wiring for the sw-dev-team-template framework.
acceptance_criteria: All handoff JSON files under docs/handoffs/ validate against schemas/handoff.schema.json.
.devteam/active-handoff.json resolves to a valid active handoff via scripts/hooks/lib/handoff.py.
task_id values are unique across docs/handoffs/.
hard_rule_traces cover all applicable hard rules for this framework-maintenance task.
Gate mode is warn (non-blocking) for PreToolUse hooks.

hard_rule_traces.description: This handoff produces commits and requires a code-reviewer artifact before completion is accepted.
Owner role is software-engineer; top-level tech-lead production authoring remains blocked for this task.
The handoff-stop-gate.py hook enforces the pre-close audit before the top-level session stops.
framework_scope is framework-maintenance, authorizing edits to shipped docs/, schemas/, scripts/, and tests/ paths for this task.

tests.name: tests/hooks/test-handoff-contracts.sh
tests.note: 20/20 passed — run during v1.1.1 retroactive closeout of fw-012; v1.1.0 shipped commit 20713d0

reviews.note: Spec 012 code-reviewed extensively across multiple sessions; v1.1.0 tagged at 20713d0 (2026-05-28 04:33 UTC). Back-fill for release that shipped without explicit handoff close.

completion.closeout_note: Retroactive closeout per GitHub issue #284. v1.1.0 shipped at commit 20713d0 (2026-05-28 04:33 UTC) consuming all spec-012 work. Evidence gates satisfied: test (20/20 pass), review (multi-session code-review record in git history). Active pointer cleared.
